function.message: Handled the next inbox item by OCRing all Petra Novak-related bills into YAML frontmatter and removing the processed inbox request.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap, inspected 99_system before task work, used inbox-processing workflow, OCR workflow, migration workflow, and finance schema; verified Petra via canonical entity file; preserved original bill bodies and deleted the inbox item only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md asked to OCR all bills related to Petra Novak. Canonical identity for Petra Novak was confirmed in 10_entities/cast/petra.md. Searching and then reading the two Petra-related purchase records showed complete visible bill data supporting all required bill-schema fields from 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md, so adding YAML frontmatter to both existing purchase notes was fully supported by local evidence. The inbox-processing workflow authorizes deleting the processed inbox file after successful completion.
